headlines.title: Military airstrike kills 117 people at Tumfa market in Nigeria's Zamfara State
headlines.summary: Military airstrike targets Tumfa market in Zurmi LGA, Zamfara State, killing 117 including bandits and civilians while injuring others. Residents affected amid counter-banditry operations. Highlights risks to civilians in northwest Nigeria's insecurity; investigations likely follow.

headlines.title: UN warns Sudan war enters deadlier phase as drone strikes kill hundreds across regions
headlines.summary: UN highlights drone warfare, shelling, camp fires, intercommunal violence pushing Sudan toward bloodier conflict in Khartoum, Omdurman, El Obeid, El Goz. Millions displaced suffer worsening crisis. Matters for global humanitarian response; ceasefire urged.

headlines.title: Trump meets Xi in Beijing to address Taiwan arms sales, tariffs, Iran war
headlines.summary: Presidents Trump and Xi hold summit in Beijing covering US arms to Taiwan, trade tariffs, Iran war. Impacts global economy, alliances, security. Potential deals could stabilize or intensify US-China rivalry for readers worldwide.

framings.angle: Highlights Xi poised to press Trump on slowing arms sales to Taiwan
Outlines summit issues of Taiwan arms sales, tariffs, and Iran war
Details respective goals of Trump and Xi at high-stakes Beijing summit
Contrasts China's assertive power today with position decade ago
Covers Trump urging Xi to open China on trade, Taiwan, Iran

headlines.title: Conflicts drive record 32.3 million internal displacements worldwide in 2025
headlines.summary: IDMC reports 32.3m conflict or violence-induced internal displacements in 2025, up 60% year-on-year, exceeding disaster figure first time since 2008; total displaced 82.2m. Affects vulnerable populations globally; demands stronger international aid.

headlines.title: Congressional Budget Office estimates Trump Golden Dome costs $1.2 trillion over 20 years
headlines.summary: CBO analysis shows Trump's Golden Dome missile defense program costs $1.2T through 2046, exceeding initial $175B estimate. Strains US federal budget, defense spending. Congress faces decisions on funding amid fiscal pressures.

headlines.title: National Assembly launches probe into 27,000 tonnes missing unfit sugar in Kenya
headlines.summary: Kenya's Trade Committee investigates handling of 27,000 metric tonnes imported sugar declared unfit for consumption. Public health and importers affected. Exposes potential corruption; findings to inform regulations and accountability.

headlines.title: Bahamians vote in general election featuring immigration and cost-of-living concerns
headlines.summary: Bahamas holds election with three-way contest, record voters; immigration from Haiti, high gas prices key issues. Impacts 400,000 residents' governance. Winner shapes migration policy amid regional tensions.

headlines.title: NSW Premier Chris Minns rejects report on $37 million grants scheme redirection
headlines.summary: Premier Minns denounces inquiry finding government unlawfully redirected $37m public funds for grants, claims witnesses lied. Affects NSW taxpayers, political trust. Could prompt legal challenges or reforms.

headlines.title: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer staves off rivals' resignation challenge
headlines.summary: Starmer secures temporary reprieve by daring rivals to challenge him despite 70+ Labour calls yesterday for timetable. Leadership issues persist. Threatens UK government stability; further party infighting expected.
headlines.previousContext: Starmer dares rivals to challenge, wins reprieve Tuesday but underlying leadership problems remain
